rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in the component type scope when contracts relate to component ports
Use implementation scopes for annex blocks that reference subcomponent ports or connections
Preserve existing AADL architecture by only adding annex blocks, not modifying existing elements
Ensure all visible identifiers in AGREE expressions are properly declared in the annex block
generic_rules: Maintain the existing AADL architecture while inserting AGREE annex blocks
Use component type annex blocks for port-related contracts and implementation annex blocks for subcomponent-related contracts
Preserve all existing AADL properties and connections during the fusion process
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};`
Use `assume` and `guarantee` for contracts, `eq` for equations, and `const` for constants
Use `assign` for implementation-level bindings in implementation annex blocks
anti_patterns: Do not use subcomponent ports in component type annex blocks
Avoid using AADL property names directly in AGREE expressions without proper declaration
Do not modify existing AADL elements during the fusion process
